name: 18"x24" Whimsical Line Wall Art - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Add a touch of artsy vibe to your space with the 18"x24" Whimsical Line Wall Art from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Featuring abstract geometric shapes in a bold black tone, this framed piece instantly elevates any room. Crafted from durable polystyrene and sized at 18" x 24", its vertical orientation fits beautifully on various wall sizes, providing a modern aesthetic.

Threshold™ designed w/Studio Mcgee: Looks like home, feels like you.
